meta.title: MAIB — Renan Mocelin
meta.description: Renan Mocelin's personal brand and the MAIB presence: AI, automation, Claude Code and development.

blog.description: Technical notes on AI, Claude Code, and what I learn building MAIB.

about.lead: AI engineer. I build systems that put language models into production: deterministic LLM programming, RAG, and automation that has to work outside the demo.
about.p2: I run MAIB, AI consulting and automation. I'm currently an AI engineer at Freedom.AI and did an AI residency at SENAI/SC.
about.p3: 1st place at ActInSpace 2026, representing Brazil in the global final in France. 2nd at AKCIT 2025. Here I write what I learn building.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: AI consulting and automation through MAIB. To talk about a project, write to me.

about.title: About
about.lead: AI engineer. I build systems that put language models into production and keep working outside the demo.

bio.p1: I run MAIB, AI consulting and automation. The work is taking LLMs from prototype to production: deterministic model programming, RAG, automation that holds up in the real world.
bio.p2: I'm currently an AI engineer at Freedom.AI and did an AI residency at SENAI/SC. MAIB is where this becomes a service for people who need the result, not the demo.
bio.p3: Here I write what I learn building: Claude Code, LLM programming, what breaks in production and how I fix it.

items.description: Every detail is evidence. What ships is what holds on its own, not what merely looks ready.
I speak the language of people who build, without diluting it and without marketing layered over engineering.
Deliberate risk, never mess: I test what's ahead of the curve and measure the result.

journey.heading: Journey
journey.body: The most recent track record: 1st place at ActInSpace 2026, representing Brazil in the global final in France, and 2nd at AKCIT 2025. Along the way, an AI residency at SENAI/SC and my current role as AI engineer at Freedom.AI, while running MAIB.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: To talk about an AI project through MAIB, write to me. Email and LinkedIn are the fastest way.

experience.lead: Where I've worked, what I studied, and the tools I use to put AI into production.
